basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Raipur Invites Applications for Senior Resident (Non-Academic) Posts Under Govt. of India Residency Scheme 2026
basic_details.total_vacancies: 32 (UR-14, OBC-08, SC-05, ST-02, EWS-03) [Including 1 PwBD post]
basic_details.job_location: AIIMS Raipur, G.E. Road, Tatibandh, Raipur – 492 099 (Chhattisgarh)
basic_details.short_information: Medical postgraduates looking for a short-term residency opportunity under the Government of India scheme now have a new opening at one of India's premier public health institutions. All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS) Raipur, Chhattisgarh, has released an official advertisement inviting applications for the post of Senior Resident (Non-Academic) across various departments for a tenure period of 11 months. Applications open on 03 June 2026 and close on 12 June 2026.

application_fee.details: Fee must be paid via NEFT in online/digital mode only. Bank details: | Bank: Bank of India, Tatibandh, Raipur Account Holder: AIIMS, Raipur Account No.: 936320110000024 IFSC: BKID0009363

age_limit.age_details: 45 Years (as on last date of application)
age_limit.details: The upper age limit is 45 years as on the last date of receipt of application. The following age relaxations are applicable: | SC/ST candidates: 5 years OBC candidates: 3 years PwBD (General Category): 10 years PwBD (OBC Category): 13 years PwBD (SC/ST Category): 15 years Ex-Servicemen: 5 years (in addition to above relaxations, subject to conditions)

qualification.details: Candidates must possess a Postgraduate Medical Degree in the respective discipline from a recognized University or Institute. Accepted qualifications include: | MD (Doctor of Medicine) MS (Master of Surgery) DNB (Diplomate of National Board) Diploma in the respective discipline | For Dentistry Department: A Postgraduate Degree i.e. MDS (Master of Dental Surgery) in the concerned speciality is required.

vacancy_details.Department: Pulmonary, Critical Care and Sleep Medicine

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 67,700/- per month (Level-11, Cell No. 01 as per 7th CPC) + allowances including NPA (if applicable)

selection_process: Final selection will be made on the basis of Interview. In case a large number of applications are received
a Written Test / Screening Test (Computer-based or offline) may be conducted prior to the interview for shortlisting candidates. The list of shortlisted candidates
along with date and time of interview
will be published on the AIIMS Raipur website. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview.
how_to_apply: Candidates must submit the duly filled application through the official Google Form link: https://forms.gle/31zoiTgrFtTQoYcK6

In addition, candidates must also fill the application proforma available on the AIIMS Raipur website and attach the same with the Google Form. Only online applications will be accepted. Applications submitted through any other mode will not be entertained.
The advertisement and application proforma are available at: www.aiimsraipur.edu.in

faq.question: Q1. What is the pay for the Senior Resident post at AIIMS Raipur?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly pay of Rs. 67,700/- (Level-11 as per 7th CPC) along with usual allowances including NPA, if applicable.

faq.question: Q2. What is the tenure of the Senior Resident position?
faq.answer: The appointment is for a period of 11 months under the Government of India Residency Scheme.

faq.question: Q3. What qualifications are required to apply?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Postgraduate Medical Degree such as MD, MS, DNB, or Diploma in the respective discipline. For Dentistry posts, MDS in the concerned speciality is required.

faq.question: Q4. Is the application fee refundable?
faq.answer: No. The application fee of Rs. 1,000/- for General/OBC/EWS candidates is non-refundable. Women, SC, ST, PwBD, and Ex-Servicemen candidates are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the last date to apply?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application is 12 June 2026.

faq.question: Q6. Will a written test be conducted?
faq.answer: Selection is primarily based on an Interview. However, if a large number of applications are received, a Screening Test may be conducted for shortlisting. The method and schedule will be notified on the AIIMS Raipur website.

faq.question: Q7. Is TA/DA provided for attending the interview?
faq.answer: No. No Travelling Allowance or Daily Allowance will be paid to candidates appearing for the interview or written test.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the interview be held?
faq.answer: The interview will be held at AIIMS Raipur, Tatibandh, G.E. Road, Raipur (C.G.) – 492099 only.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates working in Government service apply?
faq.answer: Yes. However, they must submit a No Objection Certificate (NOC) from their present employer at the time of the interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification and application proforma are available on the AIIMS Raipur website: www.aiimsraipur.edu.in.
